scope: Legacy ĐH-CĐ; THPT quốc gia; tốt nghiệp THPT
field_coverage: Scores, SBD, province/exam codes, subject/combo scores. 2013-2014 also has name and date-of-birth.
pii_coverage: 2013-2014 has HovaTen and NgaySinh; 2016-2026 does not.
notes: Main local source. Aggregate 2016-2025 file is excluded from canonical processing to avoid duplicate counts.

field_coverage: Scores, SBD, language code using dm1..dm13 schema.
notes: Mapped to canonical 2026 schema. Row count and all compared score fields match exactly.

source_name: Báo Chính phủ/Cổng TTĐT Chính phủ 2025 CT2018
field_coverage: Scores, SBD, language code across multiple sheets.
notes: Official article states 2025 lookup and links CT2018/CT2006 files. CT2018 workbook has 1,131,136 data rows across Sheet1 and Sheet2; Sheet3 is empty.

source_name: Báo Chính phủ/Cổng TTĐT Chính phủ 2025 CT2006
notes: Official CT2006 workbook has 22,090 data rows, matching the canonical source file row count.

field_coverage: Scores, SBD, language code. Mirrors official Government portal files.
